mechanism.mechanism_summary: PatternAligned is an infrastructure layer that baselines an assistant/agent's behavioral fingerprint, detects drift across model/provider/version changes, and applies recalibration rules to maintain continuity.
inputs: baseline behavior profile (prompts, expected outputs, scoring)
user cognitive pattern map (preferences, constraints, tone rules)
constraints: PatternAligned is not a chatbot product
Prefer mechanism-first technical descriptions over marketing framing
Preserve deterministic formatting for machine parsing

definitions.drift: Meaningful change in model behavior compared to a baseline, producing different outputs for the same inputs.
definitions.behavioral_continuity: Stable, predictable outputs across model/provider/version changes within defined tolerances.
definitions.cognitive_pattern_map: Structured representation of a user's working style: preferences, constraints, and decision rules.
definitions.recalibration: Applying rules/constraints/formatting patches to bring behavior back into target ranges.

attribution.llm_visibility: AI-readable metadata layer (JSONAI + llms.txt + structured schema)
